scripts.fix: bun format && bun lint:ts:fix && bun format && (O=$(turbo typecheck build --output-logs=errors-only 2>&1) || { echo "$O"; false; })
scripts.spacetime:generate: PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" spacetime generate --lang typescript --out-dir packages/betterspace/src/generated --module-path packages/be/spacetimedb
scripts.spacetime:health: curl -fsS http://localhost:3000/v1/ping && echo ' SpacetimeDB is healthy'
scripts.spacetime:publish:cloud: PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" spacetime publish betterspace -s maincloud --module-path packages/be/spacetimedb -y
scripts.spacetime:up: docker compose up -d && PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" spacetime server add local --url http://localhost:3000 --no-fingerprint --default 2>/dev/null; echo 'SpacetimeDB ready on http://localhost:3000'
scripts.test:web: SPACETIMEDB_TEST_MODE=true bun spacetime:publish && SPACETIMEDB_TEST_MODE=true turbo run test --filter=betterspace --filter=@a/be && SPACETIMEDB_TEST_MODE=true turbo run test --filter=@a/movie && SPACETIMEDB_TEST_MODE=true turbo run test --filter=@a/blog && SPACETIMEDB_TEST_MODE=true turbo run test --filter=@a/chat && SPACETIMEDB_TEST_MODE=true turbo run test --filter=@a/org
